---
title: "Cell types in full object"
date: last-modified
code-fold: true
embed-resources: true
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
format: html
---

```{r setup}
#| message: false
library(qs2)
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)


source("20260217-helper_functions.R")


full <- qs_read("seurat_objects/20260217_Part2_fullobj.qs2")
md <- 

md <- full@meta.data 
```

# Number of cells

```{r}
#| column: page
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8


n_cells <- md |> 
  group_by(annotatedclusters,Region, Treatment.Group) |> 
  summarise(n_cells = n())

ggplot(n_cells, aes(x = Region , y = n_cells, fill = Treatment.Group))+
  geom_col()+
  facet_wrap(~annotatedclusters)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 40, hjust = 1))
```
